message:
fix(mermaid): use display width for legend truncation + O(1) constraint lookup

- truncate_legend_text: use visual_width()/grapheme_width() instead of
  chars().count() so CJK and other wide characters are measured correctly;
  replace ASCII "..." with single-char ellipsis (U+2026)
- apply_order_constraints: replace O(n) Vec::contains() with O(1) bool
  array membership check for constrained node lookup

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
